ogTitle: Goonengerry vs Goonoo Forest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goonengerry and Goonoo Forest.
heading: Goonengerry vs Goonoo Forest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goonengerry, New South Wales and Goonoo Forest, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goonoo Forest has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Goonengerry (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goonengerry or Goonoo Forest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goonengerry has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Goonoo Forest scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goonengerry scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Goonoo Forest scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goonengerry or Goonoo Forest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goonoo Forest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
